title: dryopteris varians
intro: Dryopteris varians, also known as Autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus, commonly found in Asia and Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Dryopteris varians include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder, and is also used in herbal supplements and tinctures.
